routineText:
09:00 — Wake up & go to Work
09:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
13:00
13:00 — Black Coffee + 1 tsp of sugar

-----------------------
| 14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
| — whole wheat bread 35g
| — 6 whites & 3 yolks of beldi eggs
| — eggs fried with 5g of olive oil
| — 2 garlic cloves cooked
| — 5g of raw olive oil
| — mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
| — cumin & salt
| — oat 35g + warm water
| — 1 scoop of protein powder with water
| — 1 apple (small, ~150g)
-----------------------

14:00 — Return to Work
14:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
18:00
18:00 — Out from work

-----------------------
| 18:00 — ☀️ Lunch
| — kefta 90/10 200g raw
| — kefta cooked with 1 onion (~50g)
| — kefta cooked with 5g of olive oil
| — brown rice 35g raw
| — 300g legume sauté with 5g of olive oil (40% carrot, 40% courgette, 20% onion)
| — cumin & salt
-----------------------

18:00 — Black Coffee
18:00
      — (4h) Rest or Billard & Water 1L
21:00
21:00 — Back Home

-----------------------
| 21:00 — 🌙 Dinner
| — 1.5 scoops of protein powder
| — 1 perly nature
| — 1 kiwi
| — 5g Almonds
| — 5g Walnuts
| — 5g Cashews
| — 5g Pistachios
| — 5g Pumpkin Seeds
-----------------------

01:00 — Sleep
